---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability for Mutty
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation this feature would address.

Example: "When working with deeply nested records, I find it difficult to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working. If possible, include a code example:

```csharp
// How you would like to use the feature
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the real-world scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Any other context, references to similar features in other libraries, or design considerations.
